problem: Can protein structure be predicted from sequence in real time without AlphaFold compute cost?
mechanism: DNA computing for massively parallel search
hypothesis: DNA computing for massively parallel search may resolve Can protein structure be predicted from sequence in real time without AlphaFold compute cost? by activating at the systems level.

experiment.protocol: Benchmark on standard dataset with 7 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: In the beginner's mind there are many possibilities. In the expert's mind there are few. — Shunryu Suzuki
